[[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] often stayed in '''this palace''' if he wasn't out dealing with the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
